{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Cup Sage
| introduced = cradle-09-bloodline
}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Cup Sage]] is a legendary figure.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c9">''Bloodline'', chapter 9</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|“And hence he earned his title,” Eithan said gravely. “To this day, legends speak of the Cup Sage.”<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c9" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
